properties.displayName: SEGITTUR TIP - Conexion entrante aceptada WAF contra IP
properties.description: [SEGITTUR] TIP - Conexion entrante aceptada WAF contra IP
properties.query:
let ThreatIPs = ThreatIntelIndicators
| where isnotempty(ObservableValue)
| where IsDeleted == false;
//| where Confidence >= 20;
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "FrontDoorWebApplicationFirewallLog"
| where ResourceType in ("FRONTDOORS", "PROFILES")
| where action_s != "Block"
| where requestUri_s contains "pid.segittur"
| where isnotempty(clientIP_s)
| join kind=inner (
    ThreatIPs
) on $left.clientIP_s == $right.ObservableValue
| project TimeGenerated,
          clientIP_s,
          requestUri_s,
          action_s,
          ObservableValue,
          Confidence,
          ResourceType,
          Created,
          ValidUntil
